channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Cornelia Huetter of Austria wins first-ever women's World Cup downhill held on Birds of Prey course
item.description: Cornelia Huetter of Austria navigated the tricky and steep terrain to win the first-ever women’s World Cup downhill held on the Birds of Prey course.
item.dc:creator: Pat Graham, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Former NFL QB Carson Palmer is the new head coach at Santa Margarita High School, his alma mater
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — Longtime NFL quarterback and Heisman Trophy winner Carson Palmer is the new head coach at Santa Margarita High School, his alma mater. Santa Margarita announced the hiring of Palmer on social media Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Blackhawks take on the Devils after Bertuzzi's 2-goal showing
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (9-18-2, in the Central Division) vs. New Jersey Devils (19-10-3, in the Metropolitan Division) Newark, New Jersey; Saturday, 1 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Behind program-record 18 3-pointers, Cal takes down Stanford with largest Big Game margin of victory in 42 years
item.description: Cal women's basketball beat Stanford 83-63 at Haas Pavilion in Berkeley, snapping a 12-game losing streak against the Cardinal and getting its first win in the Big Game series since 2019
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Joel Embiid sustains sinus fracture fighting for rebound, misses 2nd half of 76ers' loss to Pacers
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Joel Embiid sustained a sinus fracture when he was struck in the face going for a defensive rebound late in the first half of the Philadelphia 76ers’ loss to the Indiana Pacers on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lindsey Vonn eager for her return to World Cup ski races next weekend in Switzerland at age 40
item.description: BEAVER CREEK, Colo. (AP) — Lindsey Vonn now has a firm target for her return to World Cup ski racing at age 40: next weekend for a pair of super-G events in St. Moritz, Switzerland. She has a goal, too, and it's not showing up at the starting gate simply to show up.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Olympic athlete amateur world champion joins Jake Paul's boxing promotion
item.description: Jake Paul's Most Valuable Promotions announced it has added Olympian and amateur world champion Tammara "Tamm" Thibeault to its roster.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: UNC alum files for 2-word trademark after Bill Belichick becomes head coach
item.description: As a new era begins in Chapel Hill, North Carolina, one UNC alum is taking advantage of the opportunity with a perfect two-word trademark for the occasion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Michael Jordan's Highland Park mansion sells for $9.5M after more than 12 years on market
item.description: Michael Jordan has finally sold his mansion in Highland Park for $9.5 million, after nearly 13 years on the market, and the buyer has not yet been identified.
item.dc:creator: Marisa Rodriguez, WGN 9

item.title: White Sox trade Garrett Crochet to Red Sox for prospect package
item.description: CHICAGO — The Chicago White Sox have traded ace starter Garrett Crochet to the Red Sox for a prospect package. The White Sox are getting back catcher Kyle Teel, who is the 25th ranked prospect in baseball by MLB.com.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Joe Burrow's home reportedly broken in to Monday night during game
item.description: According to WLWT, Joe Burrow's Anderson Township, Ohio home was broken into and confirmed by the Hamilton County Sheriff's Office.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Mendenhall excited to take over at Utah State
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The Bronco Mendenhall era has begun at Utah State. Mendenhall was introduced as the Aggies new head football coach Monday, and the school is hoping he can turn the program around.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 7 of the world’s best soccer clubs will play at the Rose Bowl in 2025
item.description: The FIFA Club World Cup 2025 is being hosted in the United States, and one of the venues selected to host group stage matches is the Rose Bowl. Matches at the Rose Bowl are scheduled for June 15, 17, 19, 21, 23 and 25, officials announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Juan Soto agrees to record $765 million, 15-year contract with Mets, AP source says
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Star outfielder Juan Soto and the New York Mets agreed Sunday to a record $765 million, 15-year contract, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press. The deal could escalate to $805 million and is believed to be the largest pact in team sports history.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Allen sets NFL mark with 3 TD passes and 3 TD runs, but Stafford's Rams hold off Bills 44-42
item.description: Matthew Stafford and the Los Angeles Rams had to pile up a veritable mountain of points, yards and time-of-possession advantage early on to give themselves even a chance against the Buffalo Bills' ferocious fourth-quarter rally and a historic six-touchdown performance by Josh Allen.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: College Football Playoff's first 12-team bracket is set with Oregon No. 1 and SMU in, Alabama out
item.description: The new, 12-team College Football Playoff brings with it a promise to be bigger, more exciting, more lucrative. Perfect or 100% fair? Well, nobody ever believed that.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Brayden Point's 4-point night leads the Lightning over the Canucks 4-2
item.description: Brayden Point scored twice and added two assists, and the Tampa Bay Lightning edged the Vancouver Canucks 4-2 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Scottie Scheffler ends his big year in the Bahamas with his 9th victory
item.description:
Scottie Scheffler returned from a two-month break and nothing changed. He won the Hero World Challenge on Sunday with a 9-under 63 to tie the tournament record at Albany Golf Club and win by six shots.
Scheffler, the first player since Tiger Woods in 2009 to spend an entire calendar year at No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tourigny wins 100th game as Utah HC beats Buffalo, 5-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Michael Kesselring had a goal and an assist for the Utah Hockey Club, which handed the Buffalo Sabres their sixth straight loss with a 5-2 win at KeyBank Center on Saturday. "It's good for the confidence," Kesselring said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: LA Galaxy strike early, hold off New York Red Bulls 2-1 to win their record 6th MLS Cup championship
item.description: CARSON, Calif. (AP) — The LA Galaxy finished 26th in the 29-team Major League Soccer standings just one season ago, and their biggest supporters boycotted certain matches to protest a decade of poor performance.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: What happens when 'The Simpsons' join 'Monday Night Football'? Find out during Bengals-Cowboys
item.description: On Monday night, the entire Simpsons universe gets to experience it in a way not many could have imagined. The prime-time matchup between the Cincinnati Bengals and Dallas Cowboys will also take place at Springfield’s Atoms Stadium as part of “The Simpsons Funday Football” alternate broadcast.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, Fox 5
